reviews.comment:
No dejo de pasar por allí cuando voy a la costa. Ambiente tranquilo buena atención, buenos sanitarios y agradable espacio de descanso en el parque. Ideal para mascotas!!!

(Translated by Google)
I always stop by when I go to the coast. It has a peaceful atmosphere, good service, clean restrooms, and a pleasant rest area in the park. Ideal for pets!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXazR2bk1BEAE

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
buena atención tanto de los playeros como de los chicos que atendian la tienda, los baños estaban re limpios y los limpiaban constantemente, la tienda estaba bastante completa

(Translated by Google)
Good service from both the beach attendants and the guys who worked at the store. The bathrooms were very clean and were cleaned constantly. The store was quite complete.
